introSection: Puff The Little Fire Dragon is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Lagoon in Farmington, Utah, USA. It was built by Zierer and opened in May 1985.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: Dark orange track and green supports.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is the shape of a baby dragon; "Puff" is meant to be viewed as the offspring of the nearby, and much larger Colossus The Fire Dragon roller coaster.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * Puff The Little Fire Dragon on the park's website

fullText:
Puff The Little Fire Dragon is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Lagoon in Farmington, Utah, USA. It was built by Zierer and opened in May 1985.



Dark orange track and green supports.

The train is the shape of a baby dragon; "Puff" is meant to be viewed as the offspring of the nearby, and much larger Colossus The Fire Dragon roller coaster.


 * Puff The Little Fire Dragon on the park's website
